_meta.description: Contract for build-theme-rules: deterministic pattern classification and layout rule mapping from upstream strategic artifacts.

optional_inputs.purpose: Layout pattern extraction from competitor patterns
Primary message → hero heading, content pillar → value-prop hints
Section heading/CTA hints from theme_sections[], assets

theme_rules.description: Complete theme decision artifact: store_pattern classification + section stack + rule set.

terminal_statuses.PHASE_10_COMPLETE: Theme rules artifact generated — pattern classified, rules mapped, content enriched
terminal_statuses.PHASE_10_FAILED: Rules engine failed — classification or rule mapping error

pattern_model.classification_algorithm: Priority-ordered rule matching. First matching priority rule wins. See workflows/n8n/build-theme-rules.n8n.json Classify Store Pattern node.

determinism_guarantees.pattern_classification: Pure function of (brand_positioning, store_profile). Same inputs → same pattern.
determinism_guarantees.rule_mapping: Fixed lookup table keyed by pattern. Same pattern → same rules.
determinism_guarantees.content_enrichment: Deterministic merge of content_strategy.messaging_hierarchy and store_blueprint.theme_sections hints.
determinism_guarantees.section_stack: Fixed per pattern. Same pattern → same section order. Enabled/disabled flags never random.

build-shopify-theme.fallback: If theme_rules absent, build-shopify-theme falls back to store_blueprint.theme_sections directly.
